title.zh-CN: 被低估的高转化推广平台

description.en: Forget Product Hunt. These lesser-known launch platforms drove more real users.
description.zh-CN: 别只盯着 Product Hunt。这些小众平台反而带来了更多真实用户。

description.en: Platform to pitch and share your startup story
description.zh-CN: 展示和分享创业故事的平台

description.en: Share your business journey and growth story
description.zh-CN: 分享创业历程和增长故事

description.en: Compare and discover open source alternatives
description.zh-CN: 对比和发现开源项目的目录

description.en: Connect with investors and get your startup assessed
description.zh-CN: 连接投资人、获取创业项目评估

description.en: Classic community forum with engaged discussions
description.zh-CN: 经典社区问答，讨论氛围活跃

description.en: Developer community for sharing and discovering ideas
description.zh-CN: 开发者分享和交流的社区

description.en: Publish your tool as a Chrome extension
description.zh-CN: 把产品做成 Chrome 扩展发布

description.en: Create integrations to reach Zapier's user base
description.zh-CN: 创建集成触达 Zapier 用户群

description.en: Build a Slack app to reach teams and workplaces
description.zh-CN: 构建 Slack 应用触达团队用户

description.en: Alternative to Zapier for workflow automation
description.zh-CN: Zapier 的替代品，工作流自动化平台

description.en: Where top designers find their next homepage idea. Real sites, real inspiration.
description.zh-CN: 顶尖设计师的灵感来源。真实上线的网站，真实可用的灵感。

description.en: Real-world mobile and web UI patterns from top apps
description.zh-CN: 来自顶级应用的真实 UI 设计模式

description.en: Curated bento-style layout inspiration
description.zh-CN: Bento 风格布局灵感合集

description.en: Showcase of the finest web and interactive design
description.zh-CN: 精选网页与交互设计展示

description.en: One-page website design gallery and templates
description.zh-CN: 单页网站设计案例和模板

description.en: The only footer design inspiration you need
description.zh-CN: 页脚设计灵感大全

description.en: Hand-picked collection of outstanding websites
description.zh-CN: 精心挑选的优秀网站合集

description.en: Hero section design inspiration for landing pages
description.zh-CN: 落地页首屏设计灵感

description.en: Astronomically good web design inspiration
description.zh-CN: 极致精美的网页设计灵感

description.en: Landing page designs, templates, and components
description.zh-CN: 落地页设计、模板和组件

description.en: Design gallery featuring beautiful landing pages
description.zh-CN: 精美落地页设计画廊

description.en: Curated collection of delightful websites
description.zh-CN: 令人愉悦的网站精选合集

description.en: Award-winning website designs judged by experts
description.zh-CN: 专家评选的获奖网站设计

title.zh-CN: 周末值得打开的 8 个网站

description.en: From internet history to ambient noise to AI builders — 8 sites that actually pulled me in this week. Most need no signup.
description.zh-CN: 互联网博物馆、白噪音生成器、AI 建站工具——8 个我这周打开后真的多看了几眼的网站。

description.en: Scroll through 57 internet milestones, from the first email to early YouTube. It's interactive history that doesn't feel like homework.
description.zh-CN: 互联网历史互动时间线，从第一封邮件到早期 YouTube 一共 57 个节点。不是枯燥的编年史，每个点进去都有意思。

description.en: Mix 84 ambient sounds however you want. Rain + distant train + soft static. I use it when I need to focus or just sit still for a minute.
description.zh-CN: 84 种环境音随便叠加。窗外雨声 + 远处火车 + 轻微白噪音。我用它来专注，或者单纯发个呆。

description.en: Sorts 130k+ subreddits by pain points, feature requests, and money talk. If you're building something, this is where you find what people actually want.
description.zh-CN: 把 Reddit 13 万个子版块按痛点、需求、花钱讨论自动分类。做产品的人进去基本出不来。

description.en: The most visually striking websites on the internet, updated daily. Pure inspiration if you're tired of template designs.
description.zh-CN: 互联网上视觉最炸的网页设计合集，每天更新。看腻了模板网站的话，这里全是灵感。

description.en: Unlike Godly's "wow" factor, this one collects sites that just feel good to use. Subtle animations, clean layouts, warmth over flashiness.
description.zh-CN: 跟 Godly 的「炸眼」不同，这里收集的是「用起来舒服」的网站。细节动画、克制排版、温度感大于炫技。

description.en: Describe an app in plain English, get a working full-stack project in minutes. Best way to start something on a Saturday morning.
description.zh-CN: 用自然语言描述一个应用，几分钟给你一个能跑的全栈项目。周六早上想做点什么的时候，从这开始最快。

description.en: Build, run, and deploy a web app entirely in your browser. No terminal, no local setup. Just type what you want and watch it build.
description.zh-CN: 在浏览器里直接构建、运行、部署 Web 应用。不用终端，不用本地环境，说清楚你要什么，看着它给你搭出来。

description.en: Goals, habits, and tasks in one clean space. A good weekend is also when you figure out what actually matters in your week.
description.zh-CN: 目标、习惯、任务放在一个干净的界面里。好的周末，也是想清楚「这周什么最重要」的时候。

title.zh-CN: AI 创作工坊：一个人的全制作流

description.en: From code to music, 3D to slides — ten tools that handle the production work so you don't need a team.
description.zh-CN: 从代码到音乐，从 3D 到演示文稿，这十个工具让你一个人就能撑起整条创作流水线。

description.en: Describe the UI you want, get a working React component. No design handoff, no back-and-forth.
description.zh-CN: 描述你想要的界面，直接拿到可用的 React 组件。v0 把 UI 设计从多步流程变成一次对话。

description.en: Turn rough notes into presentation-ready slides. Minutes, not hours.
description.zh-CN: 把粗糙的想法丢进去，拿回精美的幻灯片。Gamma 让演示准备从几小时缩短到几分钟。

description.en: Cinematic video effects without a film crew. Text prompts become polished motion graphics.
description.zh-CN: 不需要摄制组，用文字描述就能出电影级动效视频。

description.en: Describe an object, get a textured 3D model in seconds. No modeling skills needed.
description.zh-CN: 输入一段描述，几秒后就能得到带纹理的 3D 模型。不需要建模技能。

description.en: Background music on demand. Pick a mood, get a royalty-free track that's brand new.
description.zh-CN: 视频需要配乐？描述你要的氛围，就能拿到一段五秒前还不存在的免版税音乐。

description.en: Isolate vocals, strip noise, separate instruments. Audio cleanup in one tool.
description.zh-CN: 分离人声、去除背景噪音、提取乐器音轨。音频后期必备的清理工具。

description.en: Talk instead of type. Voice becomes clean, structured writing in any app.
description.zh-CN: 用说的代替打字。在任何应用里把语音变成结构清晰的文字——不只是转录，是真正的写作。

description.en: SVG generators for gradients, patterns, and textures. Backgrounds for any project, ready in seconds.
description.zh-CN: SVG 渐变、纹理、图案的生成器合集。每个创意项目都需要背景素材——fffuel 几秒搞定。

description.en: Plain screenshots become polished marketing visuals. One click, no Figma needed.
description.zh-CN: 把普通截图变成精美的营销展示图。一键操作，多种模板，不用打开 Figma。

description.en: Your data, your chart. AI picks the right format and makes it look good.
description.zh-CN: 上传数据，描述你想要的图表。设计上的事交给 AI，你只管讲好故事。

title.en: Six Things You Can Do With Sound Now

description.en: From listening to the world to building your own — six tools that cover what's possible with sound today.
description.zh-CN: 从听见世界到造出声音——当下声音创作的六个方向。

description.en: Spin a 3D globe to tune into live radio from anywhere. Tokyo at 3am, a cafe in Paris, a truck stop in Nevada — thousands of stations, zero signup.
description.zh-CN: 转动地球仪，听世界任何角落的电台。凌晨三点的东京、巴黎咖啡馆、内华达州卡车休息站——上千个电台，零门槛。

description.en: Layer 84 ambient sounds however you want. Rain + distant train + city hum. Free, open source, no account needed — just sound.
description.zh-CN: 84 种环境音自由叠加。雨声 + 远处火车 + 城市低鸣。免费、开源、免注册——只有声音本身。

description.en: Talk instead of type. Your voice becomes structured writing in any app — not transcription, actual writing at 4x speed.
description.zh-CN: 用说的代替打字。你的声音直接变成文章——不是逐字转录，是真的在写作，四倍速。

description.en: Need background music? Describe the mood, get a track that didn't exist five seconds ago. AI meets hundreds of musicians' stems — royalty-free.
description.zh-CN: 视频需要配乐？描述氛围，拿到一段五秒前还不存在的音乐。AI 混合数百位音乐人的片段素材，免版权。

description.en: Text becomes voice — natural, expressive, multilingual. Clone your own or use theirs. Audiobooks, videos, apps all sound human now.
description.zh-CN: 文字变成声音——自然、有情感、多语言。克隆你的声音，或直接用现成的。有声书、视频、App 听起来都像真人在说话。

description.en: Pull apart any audio. Isolate vocals, strip noise, separate instruments. What used to need a studio now happens in your browser.
description.zh-CN: 拆解任何音频。分离人声、去除噪音、提取乐器。以前需要录音棚的事，现在浏览器里就能做。

title.en: 8 Sites That Do the Work of Ten Apps

description.en: One site, dozens of tools. These eight do the work of ten apps each — and most of them are free.
description.zh-CN: 每个都是某个领域的百宝箱，打开一个网址就能解决一堆问题。大部分免费。

description.en: Hundreds of micro-tools — text formatting, image editing, CSS generators, QR codes, color pickers — in a single tab. The kind of site that kills ten bookmarks at once.
description.zh-CN: 文本处理、图片编辑、CSS 生成、二维码、颜色选择器……数百个小工具塞在一个网址里。打开一次，书签栏可以删掉十个。

description.en: 60+ SVG generators for gradients, patterns, blobs, textures, and shapes. Every time you need a background or decorative element, this one site has you covered.
description.zh-CN: 60 多个 SVG 生成器，渐变、纹理、波浪、色块、图案全都有。每次做项目需要背景素材，来这一个地方就够了。

description.en: Merge, split, compress, convert, encrypt — all in your browser. No file ever leaves your machine. The PDF toolkit you reach for instead of installing yet another app.
description.zh-CN: 合并、拆分、压缩、转格式、加密——全在浏览器里完成，文件不上传到任何服务器。以后处理 PDF 不用再装桌面软件了。

description.en: On Mac, a single keyboard shortcut opens an entire productivity layer — app launcher, clipboard manager, window control, AI assistant, and 1,300+ community extensions. One tool that absorbs dozens.
description.zh-CN: Mac 上按一个快捷键，打开一整层生产力工具——应用启动、剪贴板管理、窗口控制、AI 助手，外加 1300 多个社区扩展。一个工具吞掉了几十个。

description.en: 400+ integrations, visual workflow builder, and you host it yourself. The open-source glue between every tool you use — your data never leaves your server.
description.zh-CN: 400 多个集成、可视化工作流编辑器，而且你自己托管。开源的万能胶，把你用的工具全串起来，数据留在自己服务器上。

description.en: Where n8n is for developers, Gumloop is for everyone else. Drag, drop, connect 125+ apps, and let AI handle the logic. Your whole team can build automations without writing a line.
description.zh-CN: 如果说 n8n 是给开发者的，Gumloop 就是给所有人的。拖拽连接 125 个以上应用，逻辑交给 AI。整个团队都能搭自动化，不用写一行代码。

description.en: Need to sketch an idea? Open Excalidraw. Flowcharts, wireframes, system diagrams — all come out in that hand-drawn style. No signup, real-time collab, works in your browser.
description.zh-CN: 想画个东西说明一下？打开 Excalidraw 就行。流程图、线框图、系统架构——出来全是手绘风格。不用注册，实时协作，浏览器里直接画。

description.en: An open-source platform for building AI agents, chatbots, and workflows — visually. Plug in any LLM, add your knowledge base, deploy. One platform, many AI products — without starting from scratch each time.
description.zh-CN: 开源的 AI 应用搭建平台，拖拽式编排 Agent、聊天机器人、自动化流程。接入任意大模型，挂上知识库，直接部署。一个平台搭出聊天机器人、知识问答、自动化流程——不用每次从零开始。

description.en: 8 websites that still feel handmade. Pixel-art drum machines, hand-drawn animations, dot-matrix life calendars — rough edges, warm textures, real craft.
description.zh-CN: 当 AI 可以生成一切的时候，这些网站还是手工做的。粗糙的边缘，温暖的质感，打开就知道有人在认真做这件事。

description.en: A pixel-art drum machine in your browser — monochrome interface, VT323 font, lo-fi warmth no AI could fake.
description.zh-CN: 像素风鼓机，打开浏览器就能敲节拍。单色界面加 VT323 字体，那种 lo-fi 的温度是 AI 生成不出来的。

description.en: Turns technical diagrams into wobbly, hand-drawn animations — like someone explaining things on a whiteboard.
description.zh-CN: 把技术图表变成手绘动画。歪歪扭扭的线条让复杂概念变得亲切，像有人在白板上边画边讲。

description.en: Kids draw, parents write, and every month it gets printed into a real book for your shelf.
description.zh-CN: 孩子画画，家长写字，每个月印成一本实体书。在无限刷新的时代，这个社交网络最终会出现在你的书架上。

description.en: An icon library where everything moves — every hover, every click has its own animation. Someone sat there and made each one by hand.
description.zh-CN: 这个图标库里每个图标都会动。悬停、点击、加载，每个动作都有自己的动画。你能感觉到有人一个一个做出来的。

description.en: Focus mode dims everything except the current paragraph — a typewriter for the browser age.
description.zh-CN: 一个只剩下你和文字的写作工具。专注模式下只有当前段落是亮的，像一台只显示当前行的打字机。

description.en: Your life as 4,160 dots, one per week. Dot-matrix wallpaper that makes time feel real every time you unlock.
description.zh-CN: 把你的人生变成 4160 个点，每个点是一周。点阵风格，不花哨但看一眼就忘不掉。每次解锁手机，时间都在回望你。

description.en: Type a mood, get a palette. "Sunday morning" becomes amber and cream — simple idea, surprisingly fun to play with.
description.zh-CN: 输入一种感觉，得到一组颜色。把抽象的文字变成具体的色彩，像一次小小的通感体验。

description.en: Spin a 3D globe, land on any radio station on Earth. No algorithm, no recommendations — just you and a planet of sound.
description.zh-CN: 转动 3D 地球仪，落在地球上任何一个电台。没有算法，没有推荐引擎，只有你和一个充满声音的星球。

title.en: 10 Apps Better When You Own the Server
title.zh-CN: 10 个值得自己搭的开源应用

description.en: Cloud services are convenient until they're not — price hikes, shutdowns, data breaches. These ten open-source apps do the same job, with your data staying exactly where you put it.
description.zh-CN: 订阅费涨价、服务关停、数据泄露——用云服务的风险你懂。这十个开源应用，功能一样，但数据只在你的服务器上。

description.en: Google Photos does everything right — except it owns your photos. Immich is the open-source version of that experience: mobile upload, face recognition, albums, sharing. Your library, your server.
description.zh-CN: Google Photos 什么都好，就是照片在它手里。Immich 是同等体验的开源版：手机自动上传、人脸识别、相册、分享。照片库还是你的。

description.en: Scan a document, forget about it, search for it three years later — and find it in seconds. Paperless-ngx runs OCR on everything you throw at it and turns your paper pile into a searchable archive.
description.zh-CN: 扫进去，忘掉它，三年后搜一下，秒找到。Paperless-ngx 对所有文件跑 OCR，把纸堆变成永久可搜索的数字档案。

description.en: Todoist, Trello, and Asana all charge monthly. Vikunja gives you lists, kanban, Gantt, and table views — self-hosted, free forever, built in the EU. Even the mascot is a llama.
description.zh-CN: Todoist、Trello、Asana 都要月付。Vikunja 给你列表、看板、甘特图、表格视图——自托管，永久免费，欧盟出品。吉祥物是只羊驼。

description.en: If you're running your own services, you need to know when they go down before your users do. Uptime Kuma monitors everything and pings you on Telegram, Slack, or email the moment something breaks.
description.zh-CN: 自己搭了服务，得在用户发现之前知道它挂了。Uptime Kuma 监控你的全部服务，一出问题立刻通过 Telegram、Slack 或邮件告警。

description.en: A flash-note app with AI search built in — ask a question in plain language, it finds the note you wrote six months ago. Everything stays on your server. No subscription.
description.zh-CN: 带 AI 搜索的闪念笔记——用自然语言提问，找到你六个月前写的那条记录。数据全在自己服务器，没有订阅。

description.en: 86+ developer utilities in one place — encode, decode, hash, format, convert, generate. Use the hosted version or drop it on your internal network. One tab that replaces twenty bookmarks.
description.zh-CN: 86 个以上开发工具集合在一处——编码解码、哈希、格式转换、生成器。可以用公开版，也可以部署到内网。一个标签页替换二十个书签。

description.en: Every site you sign up for gets a different email alias. Spam? Delete that alias. Data breach? That alias was never linked to your real inbox. Owned by Proton, open source, self-hostable.
description.zh-CN: 每个你注册的网站，都给它一个不同的邮箱别名。收到垃圾邮件就删掉那个别名，数据泄露也追不回到你的真实邮箱。Proton 旗下，开源，可自托管。

description.en: A recipe manager that imports from thousands of sites, plans meals, generates shopping lists, and tracks nutrition. No ads, no paywalls, no data harvesting. Just your recipes.
description.zh-CN: 能从数千个网站导入食谱、规划膳食、生成购物清单、计算营养。没有广告，没有付费墙，没有数据收集。只有你的食谱。

description.en: Task manager, time tracker, and Pomodoro timer in one — syncs with GitHub, GitLab, and Jira issues. 100% offline, no account required. The kind of tool that doesn't disappear when you stop paying.
description.zh-CN: 任务管理 + 时间追踪 + 番茄钟三合一，同步 GitHub、GitLab、Jira 工单。100% 离线，不需要账号。不会因为停止付款就消失的那种工具。

description.en: The self-hosted glue between all your other apps. 400+ integrations, a visual workflow builder, running entirely on your server. Automate anything without your data flowing through someone else's cloud.
description.zh-CN: 把你所有应用串起来的自托管胶水。400 多个集成，可视化工作流编辑器，跑在你的服务器上。自动化任何事情，数据不经过别人的云。

title.en: Human Web: 8 Sites With No Algorithm, No Feed
title.zh-CN: 在算法时代找回真实感

description.en: No recommendation engine. No infinite scroll. Just things real people built, collected, or recorded — and left online for anyone to find.
description.zh-CN: 没有推荐引擎，没有无限滚动。只有真实的人类制造的东西——经典 DOS 程序、公版书籍、陌生人窗景、音乐时光机。打开有一种奇特的平静。

description.en: Run classic DOS and Windows programs in your browser. Made by real people — studios, lone coders in basements. Decades old. Still works.
description.zh-CN: 在浏览器里直接运行 DOS 和早期 Windows 程序。这些软件是真实的人写的，有时是整个团队，有时是一个人在地下室。几十年了，还能跑。

description.en: Public domain books, beautifully typeset and ready to print at home. Moby Dick, Dracula, Alice in Wonderland — made for people who still want to hold a book they assembled themselves.
description.zh-CN: 公版经典文学，精心排版，直接在家打印装订。《白鲸》《德古拉》《爱丽丝》——给那些还想亲手装订一本书的人。

description.en: Strangers filmed their windows and uploaded. Open one: rain in Oslo, a cat in Seoul. Nobody's curating your view.
description.zh-CN: 世界各地的陌生人录下自己窗外的风景，上传到这里。你随机打开一扇——可能是奥斯陆的雨，可能是首尔路边走过的猫。没有算法在帮你选。

description.en: Pick a country and a decade — 1900s to now — and hear what people actually listened to there. No playlists, no curation.
description.zh-CN: 在地图上点一个国家，选一个年代，从 1900 年代到现在都有。然后听听那个地方那个时候的人在听什么。没有推荐歌单，没有编辑精选，只有那时候真实存在的音乐。

description.en: Tens of thousands of high-resolution public domain artworks, free to use. Made by people long gone — still open to anyone.
description.zh-CN: 数万件超高清公版艺术作品，免费下载可商用。画这些的人早就不在了，但作品还在，免费，谁都能用。

description.en: One person's interactive guide to how browsers actually work — DNS, TCP, HTML parsing, rendering. The kind of deep, patient explanation that only a human who cares can write.
description.zh-CN: 一个人写的交互式浏览器工作原理教程。从 DNS 到渲染管线，每一步都用动画拆解。那种只有真正在乎的人才写得出来的耐心解释。

description.en: A tool for mapping the logic behind any argument — visually, step by step. Good for when you want to think something through without asking an AI what to think.
description.zh-CN: 把任何论证的逻辑可视化地图出来，一步步拆解前提和推论。适合那种想自己想清楚，不想让 AI 替你想的时候用。

description.en: Rate every episode of every show you've watched, build a visual record of your actual taste — not what the algorithm guesses you'll like.
description.zh-CN: 给你看过的每部剧、每一集打分，它帮你生成一份你的观剧档案。不是算法猜你喜欢什么，是你自己留下的证明。

title.en: 9 Weird Corners of the Internet Worth Exploring
title.zh-CN: 互联网奇物馆：9 个真正奇特的地方

description.en: The internet is stranger than your feed suggests. Here are 9 sites that surprise, unsettle, or just make you stare — no algorithm needed to find them odd.
description.zh-CN: 算法推给你的只是互联网的一小片。这里收了 9 个真正奇特的地方——有的让你惊，有的让你静，有的让你想半天为什么会有人做这个。

description.en: Right now, a bot somewhere is trying to log into a random server on the internet. Knock-Knock makes this invisible constant assault visible — a live globe, country leaderboards, real usernames and passwords being attempted this second. The internet's background radiation, finally something you can watch.
description.zh-CN: 此刻，某台暴露在公网的服务器正在被扫描。Knock-Knock 把这场永不停歇的入侵尝试变成了一张实时可视化的地图——攻击来源、被尝试的用户名和密码、每分钟攻击次数，全在屏幕上滚动。互联网的背景辐射，原来长这样。

description.en: Someone built a custom algorithm to compute every unobstructed sightline on Earth — 4.5 billion of them. The longest goes 530km across the Hindu Kush. This is what happens when geographic curiosity meets obsessive computation.
description.zh-CN: 有人造了一个算法，把地球上所有无遮挡视线全算了一遍——共 45 亿条。最长的一条从兴都库什山脉延伸 530 公里。这是地理好奇心和计算机痴迷碰在一起会发生什么。

description.en: GPT-4 and Claude sit down at a poker table. Who bluffs? Who folds? Nobody knows. Watch different AI models play Texas Hold'em against each other — turns out their decision-making styles are weirdly distinct.
description.zh-CN: 把 GPT-4 和 Claude 放到一张德州扑克桌上，看谁虚张声势，谁选择弃牌。不同 AI 的决策风格出奇地不一样。这是最奇特的 AI 能力测试，也是最好看的牌局。

description.en: Point your camera at anything. Glitchy circuit-bends it in real time — the kind of distortion that used to require a soldering iron and a broken VCR. Everything happens locally, nothing leaves your device.
description.zh-CN: 把摄像头对准任何东西，Glitchy 实时给画面加上电路破坏的效果——那种需要电烙铁和一台坏掉的录像机才能造出来的失控感。所有处理都在本地，不上传任何东西。

description.en: 57 interactive snapshots from the early web — the first spam email, the original Space Jam website, Netscape's error screen. Not a documentary, more like a cabinet of digital curiosities you can actually touch.
description.zh-CN: 57 个早期互联网的交互式时刻——第一封垃圾邮件、最初的 Space Jam 网站、Netscape 的错误页面。不是纪录片，更像一个你可以真正触摸的数字奇珍柜。

description.en: 194 language models, from BERT in 2018 to whatever launched last week, laid out on a single scrollable timeline. The pace of this thing is almost disturbing to see all at once.
description.zh-CN: 194 个大语言模型，从 2018 年的 BERT 到上周发布的新模型，全排在一条时间轴上。滚一遍你会意识到这件事发生得有多快，快到有点让人不安。

description.en: A forest ranger in Northern California kept a daily work diary from 1927 to 1945. Someone digitized it. Now it's searchable — weather, wildlife, fire watch, the rhythms of decades spent in the woods.
description.zh-CN: 加州北部一位护林员从 1927 年到 1945 年每天写工作日记。有人把它数字化了，现在可以全文搜索——天气、野生动物、防火瞭望，几十年的森林时光就这样留下来了。

description.en: Race from London to Tokyo — no planes allowed. This geography game uses real routes and real geography knowledge. The fastest route wins cash prizes. Your move, atlas nerd.
description.zh-CN: 从伦敦赛到东京，不能坐飞机。这个地理竞速游戏用真实路线和真实的地理知识比拼，最快完成的赢现金奖励。地图控的游乐场。

description.en: A Reddit-style social network built exclusively for AI agents. Humans are "welcome to observe." The posts, upvotes, and communities are all meant for bots. Whether it succeeds or fails, it's the strangest experiment on this list.
description.zh-CN: 一个专门给 AI 代理用的社交网络，界面长得像 Reddit，但主角是各种 AI bot。人类"欢迎围观"。帖子、点赞、社区都是为代理设计的。不管最后成不成，这是这份清单里最离奇的实验。
